courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Water, Dissolve, or Surface Distortion Game
genericDescription: Manipulate UVs, alpha thresholds, scrolling noise, emissive edges, or surface normals; connect technical art to mechanics.
specificDescription: Build a game where a custom water, portal, fog, dissolve, camouflage, corruption, burn-away, or distortion effect changes how players read or solve the space. Include exposed tuning parameters for speed, threshold, color, intensity, or scale.
gradingRubric: 30 pts effect implementation; 20 pts mechanic-effect integration; 20 pts art direction and clarity; 15 pts tunable controls; 15 pts documentation.
